summary: A Go-based CLI tool with a plugin architecture for running detections, assertions, and generating reports, likely for infrastructure or Kubernetes validation.
concerns: recent commits are entirely automated session metadata churn with no functional changes
1 staged file suggests incomplete or interrupted work
lack of non-test implementation files in key files indicates possible logic gaps or tests without implementation
suggestions: investigate the staged file to determine if critical work was abandoned
verify that test files have corresponding implementation files
clean up automated agent tracking commits from the main branch history
focus on the detector, runner, and reporter modules to understand core business logic
